morning_thesis: SPY opens 738-739, bear ribbon confirmed, rally into 739-740 fails at ribbon, 5m close below Fast EMA 739.08 = ENTER short targeting 735.40. Invalidated if 5m bar closes above 741.29 on volume. Predictions: (1) SPY tests 738.10 within first 60 min RTH (conf 0.72); (2) First signal bearish (conf 0.65); (3) No 5m close above 741.29 all session (conf 0.60). Context: NVDA sell-the-news, VIX 17.74 BEAR-eligible, Aggressive PDT LIMIT reached.

predictions.claim: SPY will test 738.10 Carry within first 60 min RTH — at least one 5m bar prints low within $0.20 of 738.10
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 740.00 without touching 738.30 at any point
predictions.actual: 09:35 bar low 737.53 — broke THROUGH 738.10 by $0.57, well outside the $0.20 test window. Direction correct (tested the level) but magnitude exceeded (broke, not merely tested).

predictions.claim: First trade signal is bearish: rally into 739-740 zone fails, 5m bar closes below Fast EMA 739.08 with BEAR ribbon spread >= 30c = ENTRY
predictions.invalidation: SPY opens above 740.00 and holds 3+ closed bars above Slow EMA 739.64
predictions.actual: ENTER_BEAR at 10:35 ET (Bear 8/10, BEAR ribbon 56c spread, 3×SPY735P @ $0.69). First and only signal was bearish, within window.

predictions.claim: No 5m bar closes above 741.29 (PDC) today — NVDA sell-the-news overhang too heavy
predictions.invalidation: 5m bar closes above 741.29 on volume >= 1.2x 20-bar average
predictions.actual: SPY closed ~742.70 with bars at 742.62-742.73 by 15:30 ET. Ribbon flipped BULL by 15:30. Session was a complete reversal of the bear thesis.

surprises: 738.10 ★★★ Carry became a bull launchpad — false-break to 737.53 then immediate recovery fueled a +$5 reversal (L59 floor_hold analog)
NVDA sell-the-news absorbed faster than expected; institutional buyers stepped in mid-morning
Rate-limit blackout 11:57-14:40 ET (2h43m, ~54 ticks) — position unmanaged during full reversal window
Ghost entry: loop-state.json flat at 10:48 despite confirmed fill f0456743 at 10:35 ET
Full intraday ribbon inversion: BEAR 56c premarket → BULL 56c by 15:30 ET
lesson: A ★★★ Carry level that breaks and immediately recovers is a bull launchpad (false-break pattern), not continuation — add this branch to the premarket checklist; and rate-limit during market hours costs real P&L through missing stop management.
tomorrow_hint: BULL ribbon confirmed. 742.87 PDH = first resistance. 738.10 now support. Watch for pullback to 741-741.61 zone to hold for bull continuation.
